positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical emblem design centered around a cosmic forest scene. Depict stylized flora (large ferns, glowing leaves) intertwining with celestial elements like nebulas, crescent moons, and constellations. The style should be a fusion of Neo-Art Nouveau and delicate scientific illustration, rendered in strong, graphic silhouettes with visible line work. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette dominated by deep indigo, electric sapphire, matte gold, and soft teal. The composition must be perfectly circular and centrally focused, ideal for an apparel repeat print. Vector art quality, ink wash effect, clean boundaries, perfect symmetry, full body portrait of the scene.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, cartoon, grainy, oil painting, photo-realistic, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, poor composition
